description: Get ready to float in comfort with these floaters from timberland. Comfortable yet sturdy, these sandals are great for a stroll in the park or a walk on a trek trail. UpperSynthetic upper with forefoot straps and one ankle strap, coupled with velcro fasteners for easy adjustment to attain a snug FitStraps with mesh lining for extra breathabilityCollar strap with cushioned pad to prevent chafingCushioned inners for greater comfortRemovable back strap to convert floaters into sandalsCurved and cushioned footbed with textured pattern for a massaged feel all dayOutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional lugs for greater grip and tractionFlex grooves for natural movement of the feetSandal careWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
